name: lot of TROUBLE!
description: I'm in a lot of TROUBLE!
hints: You're in big trouble! Something went very wrong.
This usually means you died from a trap - acid pool, cave-in, or the mummy.
Common causes: jumping into the acid pool, breaking the mirror, or the mummy killing you.
You'll need to restart. Avoid acid, don't break mirrors, and keep the tanna leaves burning.
notes: Death/failure room. Reached by dying from acid, cave-in (breaking mirror), mummy, or other traps. Must restart.
